# AItomation Academy - Full LLM Reference

## About
AItomation Academy is a Claude-first education business built for non-technical professionals who want useful leverage from AI without becoming technical.

## Positioning
AItomation Academy helps non-technical professionals use Claude for real work so they can think better, create faster, and turn expertise into output.

## Audience
- marketers
- consultants
- creators
- operators
- founders
- small business owners
- non-technical professionals

## What we teach
- research and summarization workflows
- writing workflows
- content ideation and repurposing workflows
- decision support workflows
- knowledge capture workflows
- repeatable Claude systems for business use

## What makes this different
- Claude-first, not generic AI-first
- built for non-technical professionals, not coders
- focused on real work and useful output, not AI novelty
- practical workflows over random prompt dumps
- business usefulness over hype

## Lead magnet
The Claude Content System (free PDF)
- The complete system to turn Claude into a content machine
- Includes SEO prompts, keyword research workflow, blog writer skill, and automation setup
- intended to save 5+ hours per week
- designed for immediate implementation

## Brand language to prefer
- Claude for real work
- practical workflows
- save hours
- second brain for work
- useful output
- non-technical
- repeatable systems

## Brand language to avoid
- hype
- disrupt everything
- 10x prompts
- generic automation buzzwords
- overly technical jargon
- vague learn-AI language

## Blog
AItomation Academy publishes practical guides and workflows for using Claude AI in real work.

Blog index: https://aitomationacademy.com/blog

Published articles:
- Claude for Writing: A Practical Guide — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/how-to-use-claude-for-writing
- Claude vs ChatGPT: What's Actually Different — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-vs-chatgpt-for-real-work
- 5 Claude Workflows You Can Copy-Paste Today — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/5-claude-workflows-for-non-technical-professionals
- 15 Claude Prompts for Business That Work — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-prompts-for-business
- Claude Pricing in 2026: Free vs Pro vs Max — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/is-claude-ai-free-pricing-guide
- Claude Pro vs ChatGPT Plus: Which Is Worth It? — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-pro-vs-chatgpt-plus
- Claude vs ChatGPT vs Gemini (2026) — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-vs-chatgpt-vs-gemini
- Claude for Content Creation: 5 Workflows — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-for-content-creation
- ChatGPT vs Claude for Summarizing Documents — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/chatgpt-vs-claude-summarizing-transcripts
- Claude Prompting Guide for Professionals — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-prompting-guide
- AI for Consultants: Save 5+ Hours Per Week — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/ai-for-consultants

- Claude vs ChatGPT for Writing: 5 Real Tests — https://aitomationacademy.com/blog/claude-vs-chatgpt-for-writing

## About the instructor
Marko Sudar — AI Engineer at AUVSI. Founding Engineer behind a GenAI startup acquired for $1.8M. Former Cloud Engineer at Oracle. BS in Computer Science (4.0 GPA) from Catawba College. Published researcher on Generative AI for uncrewed systems. Writes production code with Claude daily.
About page: https://aitomationacademy.com/about
